evals.prompt: Create self-introduction slides for my Google SWE interview. 3 minutes.
evals.expected_output: Reads materials, checks for existing JD/recon in docs/, generates 5-7 Marp slides with speaker notes, saves to docs/slides/google-swe-slides.md, provides export instructions

evals.prompt: I need a 1-minute self-intro presentation for Stripe. Keep it minimal.
evals.expected_output: Generates 3-4 concise slides (title + 1 key experience + why Stripe), saves to docs/slides/stripe-slides.md, respects the tight time constraint

evals.prompt: Generate interview slides in Chinese for my TSMC interview.
evals.expected_output: Generates slides in Traditional Chinese, uses zh content from bilingual materials, saves to docs/slides/tsmc-slides.md

evals.prompt: Make slides for my Appier ML Engineer interview. I already did /job-recon and /generate-resume for them.
evals.expected_output: Finds and incorporates existing docs/research/appier-*.md recon report and docs/resumes/appier-*/jd.md, tailors slides to match JD keywords and recon insights
evals.notes: Tests integration with existing recon and resume data
